name: National Bank of Canada
description: National Bank of Canada is the sixth-largest commercial bank in Canada, headquartered in Montreal. Founded in 1859, the bank provides a comprehensive range of financial services to individuals, businesses, and institutional clients. Its operations span personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and financial markets. With a strong presence across Canada and international reach, the institution is committed to supporting its clients' financial goals through innovative digital solutions, personalized advisory services, and a focus on sustainable economic growth, while maintaining a significant role in the Canadian financial landscape.
